<!--
Thanks for filing an issue. Please fill in the sections below.
For questions and general discussion, the Discord is a better fit:
https://discord.com/invite/7wanVzCBWf

Feature requests are welcome too. Discord is usually the better place to
discuss them, but you are also welcome to discuss them here.
-->

If you are reporting an issue where you are not able to compile your document, please do the following first:

1. Set a main file in the file explorer: right-click a .tex file and click "Set as main file"
2. Check your compile command (Terminal > Configure compile command)
3. Can you compile the document in the Texpile terminal? Paste your compile command directly into the terminal and run it
4. Is your document itself broken? Open a native terminal (PowerShell, bash, etc.) and check whether it compiles there
5. If possible, attach the compile log, in full or at least the part with the error

If you are reporting an issue with live mode, please classify it:

1. The preview is incorrect: regular lualatex produces a different PDF than live mode
2. Any other issue

Please understand that in live mode, only a limited set of things can be rendered instantly.
